description:
Description

NIKE Performance Cushion No-Show Socks with Band (6 Pairs) offer the perfect combination of cushioning and comfort. Supportive fit with arch compression. Reinforced heel and toe for enhanced durability.
features: Reinforced heel and toe for enhanced durability in high-wear areas
Rib cuffs for a snug, comfortable fit
Arch support for a secure fit
parentTitle: NIKE Performance Cushion No-Show Socks with Band (6 Pairs)
style: Nike Performane Cushion No Show Socks 6 Pairs - Band
title: NIKE Performance Cushion No Show Socks With Band (6 Pairs), Black/White, Medium
